faqs.question: shipping
faqs.answer: We offer free shipping on orders over $50. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days.

faqs.question: returns
faqs.answer: You can return items within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in original packaging.

faqs.question: payment
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and bank transfers.

faqs.question: tracking
faqs.answer: You can track your order using the tracking number provided in your shipping confirmation email.

faqs.question: contact
faqs.answer: You can contact our support team at support@famivita.com or through this chat.
